calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Murray Jones, Petitioner in Pro Per.

Mr. Jones explained that he is a cousin of the decedent and that he filed the petition in order to obtain a certified copy of the death certificate. He stated that the vital records office had informed him that, as a cousin, he would need a court order to obtain the certificate.

The Court noted that there already appears to be a death certificate and advised Mr. Jones that this petition was not the appropriate method for obtaining a certified copy. The Court suggested to Mr. Jones that the court's Access Center might be able to assist him or direct him to the proper resources.

Following discussion, the Court took the petition off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
